summary: After escaping a grueling fight with Raina, the protagonist travels with his companion Teng-i to the peaceful Buzz Island to meet Teng-i's bear-folk parents. Upon arriving at their village, they are warmly welcomed by his family, who reveal that Teng-i can transform into a human but prefers his bear form. To prove his strength to the protective parents, the protagonist accepts an S-level quest to investigate a mysterious cave, where he immediately encounters a monstrous creature named Romelon.
key_moments: The protagonist and Teng-i arrive at Buzz Island and visit Teng-i's family home.
Teng-i's parents explain their family's ability to transform into humans and express their approval of the protagonist.
The protagonist accepts an S-level quest to investigate a cave, leading to a confrontation with a monster named Romelon.
